publishedAbstract: - This is a new ODF 4.16 install with Multus Network, just after installation, ceph status is HEALTH_OK but PV creation fails, from csi-rbdplugin-provisioner csi-provisioner container logs: ~~~ I1106 09:40:05.641362 1 event.go:298] Event(v1.ObjectReference{Kind:"PersistentVolumeClaim", Namespace:"openshift-storage", Name:"rh-testing", UID:"0085cfd9-a4a9-41e0-beb7-dcc158a03d03", APIVersion:"v1", ResourceVersion:"1609766", FieldPath:""}): type: 'Warning' reason: 'ProvisioningFailed' failed to provision volume with StorageClass "ocs-storagecluster-ceph-rbd": rpc error: code = DeadlineExceeded desc = context deadline exceeded...and then next attempts from csi driver: I1106 09:40:06.147708 1 event.go:298] Event(v1.ObjectReference{Kind:"PersistentVolumeClaim", Namespace:"openshift-storage", Name:"rh-testing", UID:"0085cfd9-a4a9-41e0-beb7-dcc158a03d03", APIVersion:"v1", ResourceVersion:"1609766", FieldPath:""}): type: 'Warning' reason: 'ProvisioningFailed' failed to provision volume with StorageClass "ocs-storagecluster-ceph-rbd": rpc error: code = Aborted desc = an operation with the given Volume ID pvc-0085cfd9-a4a9-41e0-beb7-dcc158a03d03 already exists ~~~- Another observation was ceph status reported `Global Recovery Event` ~~~ health: HEALTH_OK progress: Global Recovery Event (2m) ~~~
publishedTitle: ODF with Multus - Fail to create ceph PVs after new install - Global Recovery Event
